---
lang: en-EN
title: Supervised approach using TorchTextClassifiers

format:
  html:
    number-sections: true
---
To complete

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}

## Attention

To complete

:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="false" icon=false}
## `<i class="bi bi-book"></i>`{=html} Exercice 1: To complete

1. To complete.

```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: Cliquer pour voir la réponse
#| code-overflow: scroll

print("Hello")
```

2. To complete.

```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: Cliquer pour voir la réponse
#| code-overflow: scroll

print("Hello")
```

3. To complete.

<details>
<summary>Clue here</summary>
To complete.
</details>

:::
